text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I'm terribly sorry. This was completely my fault. I
wasn't good enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the Mejiro family, I regret making
such an embarrassing display.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I utterly failed to live up to your
expectations.
choice_data_list: Are you going to just run away, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If I don't use this as a stepping
stone, then it will have all been meaningless.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Regret is a bitter pill, indeed. I will not take such
a pill again.
choice_data_list: Next time, we'll savor the sweet taste of victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The sweet taste of victory. Yes... As a Mejiro, I
must experience it for myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, Trainer... Please, make me even
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The very idea of running away is preposterous. It
would be a further disgrace to the Mejiro name!
choice_data_list: Then let's look to the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, of course. Next time, I will win for certain. I
absolutely will!
